title: Dutch Apple Tart
description: A classic dessert consisting of a buttery tart crust topped with a delicious mixture of apples and stroop. Perfect for any occasion.
instructions: Make the pastry dough by combining flour, butter, and sugar in a bowl. Gradually add eggs until a dough forms.
Roll out the dough and transfer it to a tart pan. Chill in the fridge for 15 minutes.
Arrange the apple slices on top of the pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Drizzle stroop over the apples, spreading it evenly.
Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the apples are tender.
Let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
